snippet.title: MADHANYA - Rahul Vaidya & Disha Parmar | Asees Kaur |Lijo-DJ Chetas| Anshul Garg | Wedding Song 2021
snippet.description:
Anshul Garg presents Madhanya by Rahul Vaidya & Asees Kaur featuring Rahul Vaidya & Disha Parmar. 


Singer: Rahul Vaidya & Asees Kaur
Music: Lijo George & Dj Chetas
Lyrics: Kumaar
Song Produced by Lijo George
Mixed and Mastered by Shadab Rayeen @ New Edge
Assistant engineer: Pukhraj
Vocals recorded at Soundideaz & Click Studios
Recording Engineers : Kittu & Rupak
Featuring: Rahul Vaidya & Disha Parmar

Producer - Anshul Garg

Video Director - Rajan Bir 
Video Supervisor - Raghav Sharma
Dop - Shinda Singh
Project Manager - Piyush Chandak
Co - Director - Anmol Randhawa 
Choreographer - Sahil Sharma 
Assistant Choreographer - Rajat 
Editor - Gaurav K Mehra 
Di - Onkar 
Styled by - Outro by Akshita & Anulika 
Jib operator - Manish Arora
Line producer  - RS films and production 
Makeup - Rajan Passi
Artwork - Vicky Sandhu
Distribution - Believe Digital
Promotions - Underdog Digital


Madhanya Lyrics : 

Beetein saare mausam
Babul tere ghar mein
Ab chale pav mere
Piya ke shehar mein (2)

Ho Tune Vidayiyan kaise
Likhi Marjaaniyan
Kaise bataye O Rabba
Sahi naiyon jaaniyan

Madhaniyan
Haaye o mere babula teriyan
Mithiyan yaadan
Mere peeche peeche auniyan haaye
Haaye o mere babula Meriya
Hun gudiyan
Kol tere reh jaaniyan haaye

Kuch bhi nahi hai tere
Kadmon se aage (2)
Tujhse jo baandhe maine
Tootenge na dhaage (2)

Haath mera thaama tune
Teri Meherbaaniyan
Mere naam ab se teri
Saari Pareshaniyan

Madhaniyan
Haaye ve mereya daadya rabba
Kinna jamiya kinna ne lai janiya haaye
Haaye ve mereya daadya rabba
Kinna jamiya kinna ne lai janiya haaye




#Madhanya #RahulVaidya #DishaParmar

snippet.title: Talja (Official Video) Jassa Dhillon | Deepak Dhillon | Gur Sidhu | New Punjabi Song 2021| Above All
snippet.description:
Brown Town Music Presents Official Video of Latest Punjabi Song of 2021 Talja By Jassa Dhillon Ft Deepak Dhillon From His Debut Album Above All.



Track Credits:
Track Name: Talja
Artist : Jassa Dhillon Ft Deepak Dhillon
Music : Gur Sidhu
Mixing & Mastering: B Saanj
Lyrics: Jassa Dhillon
Female Lead: Navi Brar
Edit & Colour Grading: Gobindpuriya
DOP: Renato Villas
Story/Screenplay: Garry Bhullar Films
Assitant Director: Paramvir
Make Up Artist: Parteek Dhillon
Bike Stunts: MSL Productions
BTS: Gundeep
Directed By: Japjeet Dhillon
Supporting Artists: Param Sandhu, Nirvair Sandhu & Lovely
Instagram Reels: Boss Music Productions
Special Thanks: Big Media
Hair Stylist: Varinder 8261
Lyrical Video:  Roop Kamal Singh
Producer: Nav Sandhu
Label: Brown Town Music
Team Believe: Shilpa Sharda & Srikant Seshadri





Online Promotions: BTown Media Entertainment
Instagram: https://instagram.com/btownmediaa​​​​​​



Do Share your feedback in comments.
Don't Forget to Subscribe Brown Town Music : http://bit.ly/subscribebrowntownmusic​​​




Talja Lyrics:

Oh baby bass rehando na lado,
mere husan de dushmna naal ,
Ehh jmaana jaalim ha,
te jaalim he rehna aa,
Oye aah kachjiya ambiya ta ma chabb k khaju , 
dekhi chall banda ki alet lene saare mai,
bicho paad du mere saale de,
 
 
Forda de toachan vargi yaari , 
ho peju pind  tere te bhari,
o vigdya jatt te jhota same
Kardu raga cho garmi saari ,
naal jo mere ohh bande agg , 
ptandar lott layinde ne thagg ,
roj da yabb  tu giriya chabb ho,
Dekh njaare ni ,
 
 
la sharta yara tera thoke te bade swaare ni , 
je kahe bna dya scene ma hune dabaare ni,
 
 
O talja o talja o talja talja talja
Talja talja ve badmasha, 
awe hoju koi tamasha ,
ve kato jaan dukhan vich pauni ,
Ve Koi la k rakh du passa ,
katt la rabb toh thoda dar k ,
thode ghot sabar de bharke,
sare pind di akh vich radke  , 
ve fadya jayega , 
awe velly banda banda ragya jayega ,
awe velly banda banda ragdya jayega,
 
Aah hukam de ike dukke  ni,
tere jatt de muhre fikke ni ,
on flasha hon kude,
rahinde saah vairi de khiche ni  ,
mast aa rahindi  chaal ,
lafdya nal kadiye laal ,
kai takkre  velly  mittra nu, 
sada vinga v na vaal , 
baba naal te khidya maal , 
te aun  hulaare ni ,
 
la sharta yaar tera thoke te bade swaare ni ,
j kahe bna dya scene ma hune dbaare ni,
 
Begaane putt hoye aa juttt , 
ve raat pawayega,
Aah patlo da dil kehnda,
tu att krayega ,
Shant shaant  k pauna,
ve jatta kurte kaale ,
chaklo chaklo kahinde,
jo pattu rakhda naale , 
tu ik te vairi bahle
Mud pachtayega ,
ve tu velly banda banda ragdya jayega
 
 
 
 
Pura tohra dhakad shora ,
ni zigre  bamb kude,
Aah rees jatt di laude,
ni jaane hamb kude
Tohna chakde roj he,
gode thale laa dya ge
Tu bol pyaar de bol  , 
hune puga dya ge
 
 
Toba toba , 
teriya galla ve,
toba toba tere karaar ,
na ishq tere vich bhora , 
ve sare auto e ne hathiyaar, 
din ne chaar te lammi car , 
sirre kuj laayega ,
jatta velly banda banda ragdya jayega ,
jatta velly banda banda ragdya jayega,
 
 
la sharta yaar tera thoke te bade sware ni.

കേരളത്തിലെ ഏറ്റവും മികച്ച വാര്‍ത്താ നെറ്റ്‌വര്‍ക്കാണ് മീഡിയവണ്‍ . ഏറ്റവും കൂടുതല്‍ പേര്‍ തത്സമയം മലയാളം വാര്‍ത്തകള്‍ കാണുന്ന മലയാളത്തിലെ മുന്‍നിര വാര്‍ത്താ ചാനല്‍. മൂല്യാധിഷ്ഠിതവും സ്വതന്ത്രവുമായ മാധ്യമപ്രവർത്തനം നടത്തുന്ന മലയാള ന്യൂസ് ടെലിവിഷൻ ചാനലാണിത്‌. ലോകമെമ്പാടുമുള്ള ഉറവിടങ്ങളിൽ നിന്ന്സമാഹരിച്ച കാലികവും സമഗ്രവുമായ  വാർത്തകളും പ്രോഗ്രാമുകളും വ്യത്യസ്തമായ രീതിയിൽ മീഡിയവൺ പ്രേക്ഷകരിലെത്തിക്കുന്നു. 

 24 മണിക്കൂറും ലോകത്തിന്‍റെ ഏത് ഭാഗത്ത് നിന്നും ഇവിടെ തത്സമയം #ലൈവ് കാണാം. അതിവേഗം വാര്‍ത്താ വീഡിയോകള്‍ ലഭിക്കാൻ മീഡിയവണ്‍ സബ്സ്ക്രൈബ് ചെയ്യൂ... ബെല്‍ ബട്ടണും ക്ലിക്ക് ചെയ്യൂ.

snippet.description:
AMIT SAINI ROHTAKIYA : Sawaal (Official Video) New Haryanvi Songs Haryanavi 2021 | Ravi P | Priya S

Music Studio Haryanvi Presents Full Video of New Haryanvi Songs Haryanavi 2021. Sawaal सवाल ( Official Video ). Another superhit haryanvi song sung by Amit Saini Rohtakiya. Starring by Amit Saini Rohtakiya, Ravi Panchal , Priya Soni & Shivashdeep Jangid. Music by GR Music. Lyrics are penned by Aamin Barodi. Lyrics :-
Mein tere bina rahluga tu rahlegi ke na,
Mein dard ghane sah lunga tu sahlegi ke na
Mein dard ghane sah lunga tu sahlegi ke na 
Re chalo maan liya gerah ki bahya me jhul jaagi tu
Par khud te to puchh sawaal ke mane bhul jaagi tu 
Par khud te to puchh sawaal ke mane bhul jaagi tu 

Jab hovega ahsas tene kale panka,
Aaj rousu me kaal tubhi rovegi,
Yo pagal sa aave tene yaad itna,
Gulab ki patiya me tohvegi 
Gulab ki patiya me tohvegi 
Are kisi ger ne maan ke apna kabul jaagi tu
Par khud te to puchh sawaal ke mane bhul jaagi tu 
Par khud te to puchh sawaal ke mane bhul jaagi tu

Tu magegi re mot tane mot na mile
Dard judayi aala sahya jaavena
Aamin barodi Jeeve ghut 
Aamin barodi Jeeve ghut
ke Makha kisite ab kuch kahya jaave na 
ke Makha kisite ab kuch kahya jaave na
Are mere pyaar ka aaj chuka ke mul jaagi tu
Par khud te to puchh sawaal ke mane bhul jaagi tu 
Par khud te to puchh sawaal ke mane bhul jaagi tu

मैं तेरे बीना रहलुगा तू रहेली के ना, 
मीन डार घने सो लुंगा तू सहेली के ना 
मीन डार घने सो लुंगा तू सहेली के ना
 री चल मन लिया गेर की बात मैं झुल जागी तू 
पार खुद ते पूछ सयाल के मन भुल जागी तू 
पार खुद ते पूछ सयाल के मन भुल जागी तू 
जब होवेगा आहस तेने काले पांका,
Aaj rousu me kaal tubhi rovegi, 
यो पागल सा अवे तेने यद इतना,

snippet.title: We Made Real Remote Controlled Car - सपना सच हो गया 😎
snippet.description:
Dream Comes True Full Size Remote Controlled Car 

We Made Real Driverless Car - Remote Controlled 

Jab Me Chota Tha Tabhi Se Muje Rc Cars Chalana Pasand Tha But Ab Hm Bde Ho Chuke H Isilye Hmne Hmari Real Bdi Car Ko Hi Remote Controlled Driverless Car Bna Diya Ise Chalane Me GTA Game Jesi Feeling Aati H.

Some Of Videos That You Will Love.

1. हमारी कार पलट गई - Crazy Modification In Our Car
     https://youtu.be/-j4jSlI4Sk8

2. Only For Titanium Army - Color Explosion
     https://youtu.be/sSW9GQQ0PAU

3. चलती गाड़ी में लगा दी आग - Ghost Rider Bike 100% Real
     https://youtu.be/VWamm8YvmNM

4. बड़े VIP ने मचाया कार में धमाल - Big Vip Vs Our Car Experiment
     https://youtu.be/8iETO5EgIMs

5.  Testing NASA Rocket Fuel - असली रॉकेट ईधन ने मचाया धमाल
      https://youtu.be/RNv3kcA0kKU

6.  Running Bike On Deodorant - Shocking But 100% Working
       https://youtu.be/hWL_oemgAk0

7.  We Made India's Biggest Parachute - Gone Out Of control
     https://youtu.be/boBJzML_1UI

8.  We Fly India's Biggest Hot Air Balloon - Worth ₹ 1Crore...
      https://youtu.be/SLA-KwFSw00

9.  Flying India's Biggest Water Bottle Rocket
      https://youtu.be/WcqrkHdYBfc

10. अब होगा असली धमाल - Coca Cola Rocket Chain Reaction
       https://youtu.be/PgB71tKj2wg
This Video Is Just For Entertainment And Fun Purposes Only Plz Don't Try To Do Or Recreate Any Action Shown In This Video Just Watch And Enjoy  

Love You Titanium Army

snippet.title: കോവിഡ് രണ്ടാം തരംഗത്തിൽ 4 പുതിയതരം രോഗലക്ഷണങ്ങൾ. എല്ലാവരും അറിഞ്ഞിരിക്കേണ്ട പ്രധാനപ്പെട്ട ഇൻഫർമേഷൻ
snippet.description:
കോവിഡിന്റെ ആദ്യതരംഗത്തിൽ കാണാത്ത  ചില പുതിയ ലക്ഷണങ്ങൾ.. 
0:00 Start
3:25 കേരളത്തില്‍ ഗുരുതരം ആകുന്നത് എങ്ങനെ?
5:00 ഒന്നാമത്തെ ലക്ഷണം?
6:03 രണ്ടാമത്തെ-മൂന്നാമത്തെ ലക്ഷണം?
6:50 നലാമത്തെ ലക്ഷണം?
9:00 ബാധിച്ചാല്‍ എന്തു സംഭവിക്കും
10:00 എന്തു മുന്‍ കരുതല്‍ എടുക്കണം?

കോവിഡിന്റെ ഈ രണ്ടാം തരംഗം കേരളത്തിൽ കൂടിയാൽ ഉണ്ടാകുന്ന അപകടങ്ങൾ എന്തെല്ലാം ? ഈ ഇൻഫർമേഷൻ എല്ലാ മലയാളികളുടെയും അറിവിലേക്കായി പരമാവധി ഷെയർ ചെയ്യുക.. കേരളത്തിൽ കോവിഡ് പടരുന്നത് നമ്മുടെ തടയണം

For Appointments  Please Call 90 6161 5959

snippet.title: Prince Philip's funeral: the key moments
snippet.description:
The funeral of the Duke of Edinburgh has taken place at St George's Chapel in Windsor.

The Queen led her family in mourning her husband of 73 years.

The service was led by the Dean of Windsor, who paid tribute to Prince Philip's "kindness, humour and humanity" - as well as his "unwavering loyalty" to Her Majesty.

Sky's Jason Farrell looks at how the funeral unfolded.

snippet.title: TVF's Aspirants | Web Series | Episode 2 | Teacher Sahi Hona Chahiye
snippet.description:
Episode 3 goes live as soon as we reach 8.5M Subscribers

Like the Episode? Rate us on IMDb - https://www.imdb.com/title/tt14392248/

Having a good teacher is extremely important while preparing for UPSC. Abhilash knows it, but he thinks his teacher is not good enough and wants to leave his current coaching center and find a better one. But his current institute doesn’t have a fee-return policy. What will Abhilash do now? Will he continue with his current coaching center or will he find a better teacher?

One of the biggest and most ambitious dreams - to become an IAS officer! Here’s to the ones who are working hard to crack it. snippet.title: IPL 2021: ఇగ నా వల్ల ఐతలేదురా బయ్, నే బోత | Fans Troll SRH On Twitter | MI v SRRH | Oneindia Telugu
snippet.description:
IPL 2021, MI vs SRH Highlights: David Warner's side crashed to their third defeat of the season against the defending champions in Match 9 of the ongoing IPL 2021 season, on Friday.
#IPL2021​
#MIvsSRH​
#MIBeatSRHby13Runs​
#KaviyaMaran​ 
#ManishPandey​
#MemesOnSRH
#TrollsOnSRH
#SunrisersHyderabad​
#SRHLossvsmi​
#ManishPandey​
#MumbaiIndians​
#KaneWilliamson​
#DavidWarner​
#RohitSharma​
#AmbatiRayudu

IPL 2021 సీజన్, 14వ ఎడిషన్‌లో సన్‌రైజర్స్ హైదరాబాద్ ముచ్చటగా మూడోసారి ఓటమి పాలైంది. చేతికి అందేంత ఎత్తులో ఉన్న లక్ష్యాన్ని ఛేదంచలేక చతికిలపడటం ఆ జట్టుకు బాగా అలవాటైనట్టుంది. లక్ష్యానికి చేరువగా వెళ్లి డీలాపడటం వరుసగా ఇది మూడోసారి. 13 పరుగుల తేడాతో మూడో మ్యాచ్‌ను కూడా ప్రత్యర్థికి కోల్పోయింది. ఓపెనర్లు తప్ప ఆ జట్టులో ఇంకెవరూ నాణ్యమైన బ్యాట్స్‌మెన్ లేనట్టు కనిపిస్తోంది. వారిద్దరూ అవుటైతే.. తమ జట్టును ఆ దేవుడు కూడా కాపాడలేడనే విషయాన్ని మరోసారి రుజువు చేసుకుంది

IPL 2021 సీజన్, 14వ ఎడిషన్‌లో సన్‌రైజర్స్ హైదరాబాద్ ముచ్చటగా మూడోసారి ఓటమి పాలైంది. చేతికి అందేంత ఎత్తులో ఉన్న లక్ష్యాన్ని ఛేదంచలేక చతికిలపడటం ఆ జట్టుకు బాగా అలవాటైనట్టుంది. లక్ష్యానికి చేరువగా వెళ్లి డీలాపడటం వరుసగా ఇది మూడోసారి. 13 పరుగుల తేడాతో మూడో మ్యాచ్‌ను కూడా ప్రత్యర్థికి కోల్పోయింది. ఓపెనర్లు తప్ప ఆ జట్టులో ఇంకెవరూ నాణ్యమైన బ్యాట్స్‌మెన్ లేనట్టు కనిపిస్తోంది. వారిద్దరూ అవుటైతే.. తమ జట్టును ఆ దేవుడు కూడా కాపాడలేడనే విషయాన్ని మరోసారి రుజువు చేసుకుంది

mr.title: झूम - भाग २ | हिट अँड रन (एल.एल ४४) | मराठी वेबसिरीज | #bhadipa #bira91boom
mr.description:
रेवसोबत दारू पिण्यासाठी गौरव ने आखला होता बेत पण शेवटच्या क्षणी त्यात झाला आहे बदल. कसा सापडतो तो मित्रांच्या टोळीत आणि त्या पुढे ते सगळे कोणत्या मोठ्या गोंधळात अडकतात? जाणून घेण्यासाठी हा भाग शेवटपर्यंत पाहा. 
झूम ही आमची एक नवीन वेब सिरीज आहे. मित्र, कुटुंब, आणि गडबड-गोंधळ ह्या सर्वांनी भरपूर असा हा अनुभव नक्की घ्या. घेऊन येत आहोत एक नवीन भाग  प्रत्येक रविवारी. म्हणूनच #भाडिपा ला सबस्क्राईब करा.

snippet.description:
Part of 'Vande Guru Paramparaam' - A Spiritual Musical Series. 

Music - Composed, Produced, Directed, Recorded, Mixed, Mastered, Video Edited, Harmonium & Transliterated by Kuldeep M Pai
http://kuldeepmpai.com
http://www.youtube.com/kuldeepmpai
http://www.facebook.com/kuldeepmpai
http://www.twitter.com/kuldeepmpai

Rendered by 7 little gems:
Paavani Cotah, Prakruthi. R, Nirantara Ranjeev, Maya Swaminathan, Shree. S, Sarvashri V. Madhan, Sriranjini. B 
Additional lyrics: Dr. G Suresh
Live Percussions & Melodic Arrangements : Ganapathi
Recorded at: Chith Studios
Voice Recorded at Vanajkesav Digi Audio Waves
Thanks to Senthil Prasath.   
Cinematography : Sathya
Creative Support & Translation : Sharanya Bharathwaj
Art Direction: Cool Events
Special Thanks to : Dr. Sheela Unnikrishnan, Harinie Jeevitha, Kousalya Sarangarajan,  Mridula Sivakumar, Rajadarshini Saravanan & Parents of all the little ones. 

----------‐---------------------------------------------------------


Our other videos on Lord Rama:

Link: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=MyNSOu-Fl-k

Link: https://youtu.be/hZch8NXQa5A

© & ℗ 2021: Kuldeep M Pai
Licensee: Chith Foundation
All rights reserved. 

'Vande Guru Paramparaam' - a spiritual musical series produced by Sri Kuldeep M Pai is a genuine attempt at infusing the abundance of our cultural heritage in the younger generations. What better agency than Music can there be to inspire the young and aged alike? A team of talented kids spearheaded by Sooryagayathri, Rahul Vellal, Bhavya Ganapathi, Raghuram Manikandan and Paavani Cotah have played their parts in transferring the Transcendental Truth through their dulcet voices. The musical videos in this series have already won acclaim from millions of viewers across the globe. It's now time for us to bow before the lineage of Gurus and relish the beatitude of divine buoyancy. Vande Guru Paramparaam! Vande Guru Paramparaam!

snippet.description:
Angel Broking Demat Account(Free) - https://tinyurl.com/yg4fvayv
For support, WhatsApp 8688962057

A stock market, equity market or share market is the aggregation of buyers and sellers (a loose network of economic transactions, not a physical facility or discrete entity) of stocks (also called shares), which represent ownership claims on businesses; these may include securities listed on a public stock exchange, as well as stock that is only traded privately.

snippet.title: Fast & Furious 9 – Official Hindi Trailer 2 (Universal Pictures) HD
snippet.description:
In cinemas soon!

Follow us on Facebook at https://www.facebook.com/UniversalPicturesIndia/ 
Find us on Instagram at https://www.instagram.com/universalpicturesindia/
Follow us on Twitter at https://twitter.com/UniversalIND 


Genre: Action Thriller Cast: Vin Diesel, Michelle Rodriguez, Tyrese Gibson, Chris “Ludacris” Bridges, John Cena, Jordana Brewster, Nathalie Emmanuel, with Helen Mirren and Charlize Theron Director: Justin Lin Written by: Dan Casey Based on Characters Created by: Gary Scott Thompson Producers: Neal H. Moritz, Vin Diesel, Jeff Kirschenbaum, Joe Roth, Justin Lin, Clayton Townsend, Samantha Vincent

No matter how fast you are, no one outruns their past.

F9 is the ninth chapter in the Fast & Furious Saga, which has endured for two decades and has earned more than $5 billion around the world.

Vin Diesel’s Dom Toretto is leading a quiet life off the grid with Letty and his son, little Brian, but they know that danger always lurks just over their peaceful horizon. This time, that threat will force Dom to confront the sins of his past if he’s going to save those he loves most. His crew joins together to stop a world-shattering plot led by the most skilled assassin and high-performance driver they’ve ever encountered: a man who also happens to be Dom’s forsaken brother, Jakob (John Cena, the upcoming The Suicide Squad).

F9 sees the return of Justin Lin as director, who helmed the third, fourth, fifth and sixth chapters of the series when it transformed into a global blockbuster. The action hurtles around the globe—from London to Tokyo, from Central America to Edinburgh, and from a secret bunker in Azerbaijan to the teeming streets of Tbilisi. Along the way, old friends will be resurrected, old foes will return, history will be rewritten, and the true meaning of family will be tested like never before.

The film stars returning cast members Michelle Rodriguez, Tyrese Gibson, Chris “Ludacris” Bridges, Jordana Brewster, Nathalie Emmanuel and Sung Kang, with Oscar® winner Helen Mirren and Oscar® winner Charlize Theron. F9 also features Grammy-winning superstar Cardi B as new franchise character Leysa, a woman with a connection to Dom’s past, and a cameo by Reggaeton sensation Ozuna.

F9 is produced by Neal H. Moritz, Vin Diesel, Jeff Kirschenbaum, Joe Roth, Justin Lin, Clayton Townsend and Samantha Vincent.

snippet.description:
Never seen such a fearful sight’: Corpses of Covid-19 victims pile up for cremation in Varanasi.Reports and statistics talk of a grim situation across Uttar Pradesh.Watch video,

यूपी में कोरोना से हालात दिनों दिन बिगड़ते जा रहे हैं. पीएम मोदी के संसदीय क्षेत्र वाराणसी का इतना भयावह मंजर देखकर आफकी रूह कांप जाएगी..हर तरफ सिर्फ कोरोना का कहर नजर आ रहा है. हर घर में लोग इससे जूझते नजर आ रहे हैं. कई लोगों की सांसे इस से लड़ते लड़ते थम जा रही हैं. एक ही घर में दो-दो, तीन-तीन लोगों की मौत हो रही है. देखें वीडियो

A food becomes super when it has plethora of benefits, versatile uses and suits almost all body types. No, I am talking about some rare exotic fruits but are very own local produce which is very easily accessible and are also pocket friendly. Besides weight loss, these foods will provide you skin cleanse, robust digestion and optimum strength naturally. I will also share with you when and how to consume them so that you can derive max out of these superfoods. I make it a point to include these foods in my diet and I firmly believe you should too. The #1 is my all time favourite.

04:02​ - #4 Superfood of India. Among the nuts, this humble superfood has always had a bad rep.But it has some amazing benefits.
05:30​ - #3 Superfood of India. This tree is an excellent pharmacy in itself. Not just the fruit, but its rind, flowers and leaves all find an elaborate mention in Ayurvedic texts for their versatile uses.
06:59​ - #2 Superfood of India. The quintessential summer vegetable, this superfood is light on the stomach and high on nutrition.
08:28​ - Dishonourable Mentions. This section include foods which are not super but marketing makes us believe so.

snippet.title: Gun Warga - Harvy Sandhu (Official Video) | Gurlez Akhtar | Desi Crew | New Punjabi Song 2021
snippet.description:
New Punjabi Song 2021 - Gun Warga
Listen to on all audio streaming platforms: https://harvysandhu.bfan.link/gun-warga.yde

The quintessential Punjabi machismo shines in Harvy Sandhu's latest track  'Gun Warga'. Featuring music by the famous Desi Crew and featuring vocals by the amazing Gurlez Akhtar, the track will surely make you jump with energy. 

Track credits:
Song: Gun Warga
Singer: Harvy Sandhu
Music: Desi Crew
Lyrics: Jeet Kamal Kuhliwala
Video: Tru Team
Mix & Master: Sameer Charegoankar
Female Lead: Isha Sharma
Dop: Shoeb Siddiqui
Edit & DI: Garry Khatrao Media
Publicity Design: Roop Kamal Singh
Photography: Harnam Singh
Special Thanks: Sanjeev Sharma
Hair - Ravi
Choreographer - Sumit Kumar
Assistant Choreographer - Robin Singh
Team Believe: Shilpa Sharda & Akshay Kapoor

Reels Promotion - Blue Apple Digital
Online Promotions - GK Digital

Follow me on:
Facebook: https://bit.ly/HarvyOnFacebook
Instagram: https://bit.ly/HarvyOnInstagram
Twitter: https://bit.ly/HarvyOnTwitter
Snapchat: https://bit.ly/HarvyOnSnapchat

Don't forget to subscribe to my YouTube Channel:
https://bit.ly/HarvyOnYouTube

For Licensing enquiries: 
Email: sync-india@believedigital.com

#HarvySandhu #GurlezAkhtar #GunWarga

For Licensing enquiries: 
Email:- sync-india@believedigital.com

For booking enquiries:
artistbooking-india@believedigital.com


Lyrics :- 
Jione mod jiha rakhda si roab jo
vairiyan de mna vich ni
jet sky kehnda taarni aa hun kude
pyar wali jhana vich ni
heera raani de taaj vich jadya 
ni kehnda tere tann warga
munda sinn ke akhan naa kudde suttgi
ni webley di gun warga

peen jatti diya sonha utte chobar 
ve gla vicho zaan sukkiyan 
suit hunde ne import ve lahore ton
te saudi walon aun juttiyan
jinne listan ch aunde ne greek god
lainde ne dream saak de
fail jatti de husan agge sohniya 
iran diyan hooran aakhde

teri gallan diyan gallan rahe karda
jado khull jande datt ni
jehra khara vi na paave laal pari ch
oh laaliyan ne liya patt ni
kehnda nattiyan pva lu oh ch tere layi
si baapu jehra kann fadd da....
munda sinn ke akhan naa kudde suttgi
ni webley di gun warga

kala mole ve jatti di gori gall te
nazran ton raakhi karda
kaale rang da paranda bacha naag da
ve zehar wangu jaave charhda
jeet kuhliwale utte ho gaye parche
nitt hunde ne khadaak ve.....
fail jatti de husan agge sohniya 
iran diyan hooran aakhde

saah lain vi ni dinda ea bullet nu 
ni gedi utte gedi rakhda
kitte chakkya na jaave putt jatt da
ni billo tera time chakkda
teri takkni kaleja billo thaar ta
jo tappda si sun warga,
munda sinn ke akhan naa kudde suttgi
ni webley di gun warga

About Puthiya Thalaimurai TV

 Puthiya Thalaimurai TV (Tamil: புதிய தலைமுறை டிவி) is a 24x7 live news channel in Tamil launched on August 24, 2011.Due to its independent editorial stance it became extremely popular in India and abroad within days of its launch and continues to remain so till date.The channel looks at issues through the eyes of the common man and serves as a platform that airs people's views.The editorial policy is built on strong ethics and fair reporting methods that does not favour or oppose any individual, ideology, group, government, organisation or sponsor.The channel’s primary aim is taking unbiased and accurate information to the socially conscious common man.
 
Besides giving live and current information the channel broadcasts news on sports,  business and international affairs. It also offers a wide array of week end programmes.
 
The channel is promoted by Chennai based New Gen Media Corporation. The company also publishes popular Tamil magazines- Puthiya Thalaimurai and Kalvi.

snippet.title: Nayantara - Full Episode | 16 April 2021 | Sun Bangla TV Serial | Bengali Serial
snippet.description:
Watch the Full Episode of the bengali serial "Nayantara" which airs on Sun Bangla TV.

Nayantara: After 10 years of marriage, Adidev (Gourab Mondal) and Averi (Payal De) are about to experience parenthood with the birth of their first child. The doctor warns Avery that she might face life threatening complications if she decides to go ahead with the child birth. Averi does not tell Adidev about this because she wants to give him the happiness of fatherhood and be a mother herself. On the other hand, Avery means the world to Adidev, so he will definitely chose her life over the child. Avery gives birth to Tara (Hiya Mukherjee). Avery dies within a few minutes of Tara’s birth. The doctor informs Adidev that he had warned Avery but she did not listen. Adidev, who was already devastated by his wife's death, comes to know that the Income Tax Department had raided his office. Adidev starts to believe that Tara is the source of the misfortune in his life and hatred grows in his heart for Tara. On the other hand, Adidev's second wife Madhuja (Swarnakamal) loves Tara more than her own daughter Preeti. But Adideb can’t tolerate that either. Tara's only wish, will she ever get his father's affection?

snippet.title: A AA Hindi Dubbed Movie Part 3 | Nithiin, Samantha, Anupama Parameshwaran | Trivikram
snippet.description:
Welcome to Aditya Movies

Follow and Enjoy the Latest Hindi Dubbed Movie " A AA " Part 3 Starring Nithiin, Samantha and Anupama Parameshwaran. Directed by Trivikram.

#AAa #Nithiin #Samantha #AnupamaParameshwaran #AAAPart3 #AdityaMovies

Film Name: A AA
Director: Trivikram
Producer: Umesh Gupta
Actor: Nithiin
Actress: Samantha, Anupama Parameshwaran
Banner: Aditya Music India Pvt.Ltd.

A Aa Movie Synopsis:

Anasuya (Samantha) is a docile young woman who wants to break free from the clutches of her control-freak mom (Nadiya). While her mom is gone on a business trip, Anasuya sneaks up to the village of her maternal uncle. Vihari (Nithin) is Anasuya’s brother-in-law and he hosts her. Vihari’s wedding is already fixed with another girl. Anasuya’s mom gets her a wedding alliance. Rest of the story is all about the issue between these two families and how Anansuya Ramalingam and Anand Vihari unite at the end.

snippet.description:

Episode 3146 : Is Popatlal's Wedding Fixed?
---------------------------------------------------------
Pooja finally arrives at the Gokuldham Society and Popatlal has arranged a lavish welcome for her. Upon arrival, Popatlal introduces Pooja to everyone and everyone to Pooja. He then takes Pooja to his house and introduces her to the ladies of Gokuldham society Watch the full episode now.

More Useful Links :
 * Visit us at : http://www.sonyliv.com
 * Like us on Facebook : http://www.facebook.com/SonyLIV
 * Follow us on Twitter : http://www.twitter.com/SonyLIV
Also get Sony LIV app on your mobile
 * Google Play - https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.msmpl.livsportsphone
 * ITunes - https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/liv-sports/id879341352?ls=1&mt=8

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.

snippet.title: Mi 11 Ultra Unboxing : THIS IS REAL NUMBER KING!
snippet.description:
Mi 11 Ultra Unboxing : THIS IS REAL NUMBER KING!

Hey #TechBarArmy​​
This is Mi 11 Ultra & Xiaomi 80W wireless charger Unboxing in Hindi. In this Mi 11 Ultra Unboxing you will find ,Mi 11 Ultra design explained, Mi 11 Ultra battery, Mi 11 Ultra specifications, and my first impressions..

Mi 11 Ultra Specification
6.81-inch Quad HD+ AMOLED display with 120Hz refresh rate, 1700 nits (peak)brightness,Dolby Vision, Corning Gorilla Glass Victus protection
1.1-inch (126 x 294) AMOLED rear touch always-on display

snippet.title: Bicycle Bhais | Web Series | Episode 4 ft Amina Nijam | കുത്തിത്തിരുപ്പ്  | Popcorn Stories
snippet.description:
വിദേശത്ത്‌ ടോപ്പ്‌ യൂണിവേഴ്സ്സിറ്റികളിൽ സ്കോളർഷിപ്പോടുകൂടി  ഉപരിപഠനം. ഇറ്റലിയിലും ജർമ്മനിയിലും   free education  നേടിയെടുക്കാനും അവസരം ഒരുക്കുന്നു മാക്സ്‌ മോർഗ്ഗൻ കൺസൾട്ടന്റ്‌. കൂടുതൽ വിവരങ്ങൾക്ക്‌ ഇപ്പോൾ തന്നെ വിളിക്കൂ : +919995678692
http://www.maxmorganconsultants.com/

Bicycle Bhais | Malayalam Comedy Web Series | Episode 4 | Popcorn Stories 
 
Plot

The story revolves completely around the backdrop of a beautiful village and its innocent people. There is a two-wheeler workshop, owned by Suresh. His staff Podiyan known as Podimon , Kichu who introduces himself as the bike tester of the shop, but a lazy bum, in reality, Pappan the village drunkard who believes the workshop as his gin joint is the main characters and the story revolves around their friendship, joy, petty quarrels, arguments, blunders, and happiness along with other villagers. The entire plot and the characters will be enframed in Basheerian style, the village library, teashops, Toddyshop,  milk society, etc. Bindu is the wife of Suresh. She is a normal housewife. The couple doesn't have children, but they are adjusted to the fact and live happily. Bindu is a part of Suresh and his friend's group and their happiness Bicycle Bhais generally aims to present a village story with all its innocence in its visuals, characters, situations, and storyline.

snippet.title: Beintehaa | बेइंतहा  | Episode 48
snippet.description:
The don refuses to return the money. Aaliya suggests that they should steal the papers. Aayat lies to her parents about going to Mumbai. Surraiya overhears Fahad talking to Zain about papers.

#ColorsRishtey #Beintehaa

To subscribe this channel go to: https://www.youtube.com/c/ColorsRishtey1/featured

Sathiyam also offers news based investigative shows such as Urakka Solvoem, Kuttram Kuttramae, discussion shows such as Sathiyam Saathiyamae, Kelvi Kanaigal & Adaiyaalam, public interest shows such as Pasumarathaani, Ivar Yaar, Uzhavan & Urimai Kural, satirical shows such as Mic Mayaandi and history based shows such as Varalaattril Indru & Varalaaru Pesukirathu.
We as a company have passion to reach out to the Tamil speaking population world over with the honest and responsible presentation of news and current affairs that reflects the true spirit of journalism and reported with authenticity, clarity and definitive conviction. We believe that a decision made by individuals in the society who have access to information that is truthful and unbiased has the potential to impact and change the society at large. All the broadcasts of Sathiyam Television will express news in a manner that is true, integral, understandable and devoid of sensationalism or slander of any kind. All broadcasts of Sathiyam Television have a singular focus of arming the viewer with the truth that would empower them to make a decision by themselves. This change we believe in turn will prepare our Nation to face the reality of truth and motivate its citizens to operate based on their individual decision.

Sathiyam is aiming to become a strong and competitive channel in the GEC space of Tamil Television scenario. Sathiyam’s biggest strength is its people. The channel has some of the best talent on its rolls. A clear vision backed by the best brains gives Sathiyam a clear cut edge in the crowded Tamil TV landscape.

As for DTH, Sathiyam is available in all leading DTH & other OTT  platforms  Sathiyam TV is also available for viewership in the Bangalore, Mysore, Hubli & Dharwad areas of Karnataka and in Mumbai & Kolkata through terrestrial means, apart from a 24X7 web streaming at www.sathiyam.tv

Sathiyam has also ventured into offering media based vocational education and training through its educational arm, Sathiyam Academy. Apart from these, Sathiyam runs a matrimonial service by the name MY BEST COMPANION.

snippet.title: നടി  ഉർവശിയെ ഇംഗ്ലീഷ് പറഞ്ഞ് വെള്ളം കുടിപ്പിച്ച ബാലതാരം ഇന്ന് ആരാണെന്ന് അറിയാമോ l Sindhu Varma
snippet.description:
സത്യൻ അന്തിക്കാടിന്റെ സംവിധാനത്തിൽ ശ്രീനിവാസൻ, ഉർവശി, ജയറാം, പാർവതി തുടങ്ങിയവർ മുഖ്യ വേഷങ്ങളിലഭിനയിച്ച്, 1990-ൽ പുറത്തിറങ്ങിയ മലയാളചലച്ചിത്രമാണ്‌ തലയണമന്ത്രം. ചിത്രത്തിൽ ഉർവശിയെ ഇംഗ്ലീഷ് പറഞ്ഞ് വെള്ളം കുടിപ്പിക്കുന്ന ഒരു കൊച്ചു പെൺകുട്ടി ഉണ്ട്., മലയാളികള്‍ അത്ര പെട്ടെന്ന്  ഒന്നും തന്നെ  ജോര്‍ജിന്റേയും ജിജിയുടേയും മകളെ മറക്കാന്‍ ഇടയില്ല. വർഷങ്ങൾ ഏറെ കഴിഞ്ഞിട്ടും ഇന്നും ആ താരം നമ്മുടെ മലയാള സിനിമ സീരിയൽ മേഖലയിൽ സജീവമാണ്.

#SindhuVarma #ManuVarma #JagannathaVarma #PriyaVarma  #SanthaVarma #ThalayanaManthram

snippet.title: ഹൃദയാഘാതം കവര്‍ന്ന തമിഴ് നടന്‍ വിവേകിന്റെ ജീവിതത്തിലൂടെ l Tamil Actor Vivek
snippet.description:
തമിഴ് സിനിമയിൽ പകരം വയ്ക്കാൻ ആകാത്ത ഒരു ഹാസ്യനടൻ. മൂന്ന് തവണ തമിഴ്‌നാട് സർക്കാരിന്റെ മികച്ച ഹാസ്യനടനുള്ള പുരസ്‌കാരം തേടിയെത്തിയിട്ടുണ്ട്. ഒരു താരത്തിന് ശോഭിക്കാനോ പ്രേക്ഷക ശ്രദ്ധ പിടിച്ച് പറ്റാനോ നായകനാവണം എന്നില്ല എന്ന് തെളിയിച്ച് തന്ന മനുഷ്യനാണ് വിവേക്. ഒരു സിനിമയിലെ ഹാസ്യ കഥാപാത്രത്തിന് നായകനോടപ്പം ശ്രദ്ധ കിട്ടാനും അത്ര പ്രധാനമാക്കാൻ ഒക്കെ വിവേകിന് നിസ്സാരം സാധിക്കും. നായകന്റെ കൂടെ ഒരു സിനിമയിൽ മുഴുനീളം പിടിച്ച് നിൽക്കാൻ സാധിക്കുക എന്നുള്ളത് വ്ലോയ കാര്യം തന്നെയാണ്. ചില സിനിമകൾ എടുത്ത് നോക്കിയാൽ അതിൽ വിവേകിന്റെ കഥാപാത്രം ഇല്ലാതെ ആ സിനിമ പൂർണം ആവില്ല. ഇനി ആ സിനിമകൾ ഒക്കെ തന്നെ കണ്ണ് നനയാതെ നമ്മുക്ക് കാണാൻ കഴിയില്ല. അത്ര മാത്രം നമ്മളെ ചിരിപ്പിച്ച ഒരു നടൻ ആണ് ഇന്ന് നമ്മളെ കരയിപ്പിച്ച് കടന്ന് പോയത്. താളവും പ്രാസവുമൊപ്പിച്ചുള്ള സംഭാഷണശൈലിയും പ്രസരിപ്പുള്ള ഭാവപ്രകടനങ്ങളും അദ്ദേഹത്തിന്റെ പ്രത്യേകതകളാണ്. വിദ്യാഭ്യാസ-ആരോഗ്യ രംഗങ്ങളിലെ അഴിമതി, തൊഴിലില്ലായ്മ, കള്ളപ്പണം, ജനപ്പെരുപ്പം, കപടരാഷ്ട്രീയം തുടങ്ങി സമൂഹജീവിതത്തിലെ ദുഷ്പ്രവണതകളെ ഹാസ്യാത്മകമായി അവതരിപ്പിക്കുന്നതിൽ അദ്ദേഹത്തിനുള്ള പ്രാവിണ്യം ശ്രദ്ധേയമാണ്.

#Vivek #Actor #ArulselviVivek #TejaswiniVivek #PrasannaKumar #AmrithaNandiniVivek

We as a company have passion to reach out to the Tamil speaking population world over with the honest and responsible presentation of news and current affairs that reflects the true spirit of journalism and reported with authenticity, clarity and definitive conviction. This change we believe in turn will prepare our Nation to face the reality of truth and motivate its citizens to operate based on their individual decision.

Sathiyam is aiming to become a strong and competitive channel in the GEC space of Tamil Television scenario. Sathiyam’s biggest strength is its people. The channel has some of the best talent on its rolls. A clear vision backed by the best brains gives Sathiyam a clear cut edge in the crowded Tamil TV landscape.

Sathiyam has also ventured into offering media based vocational education and training through its educational arm, Sathiyam Academy. Apart from these, Sathiyam runs a matrimonial service by the name MY BEST COMPANION.

snippet.title: Barrister Babu | बैरिस्टर बाबू | Episode 245 | Coming Up Next
snippet.description:
Manorama is unable to come to grips with the fact that Bondita has foiled her plans. Watch the sneak peek of the upcoming episode.
#ColorsTV #BarristerBabu

To subscribe this channel go to: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=colorstv

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

In a bid to save an 8-year-old girl from becoming the victim of Sati, Anirudh marries a curious and tyrant girl Bondita. At a time when women education was considered sinful, Anirudh educates Bondita and makes her the first “Barrister Babu” of their region. Will their imperfect marriage turn into a successful relationship? Will Anirudh succeed in his mission to gain independence for the women in his country?

snippet.title: Pinjara Khubsurti Ka | पिंजरा खुबसूरती का | Episode 169 & 170 | Recap
snippet.description:
Omkar visits Vishakha and asks her to reveal Mayura's address, but she refuses. Enraged by her refusal, Omkar threatens to burn down Vishakha's office. Will Vishakha succumb to Omkar's threats?

#ColorsTV #PinjaraKhubsurtiKa

To subscribe this channel go to: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=colorstv

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

To go to the show playlist please click: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLcC6hSpO26Ku74uKKTMfTwGCDH6MWTzz5

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

Mayura is the epitome of beauty, grace and intelligence, but the world only sees her beauty. Trapped in a cage by a society that judges by looks, Mayura yearns for her freedom to fly free. What happens to her fight for individuality when she ends up in a marriage with Omkar, a control freak obsessed with her beauty? Will he ever see his wife beyond her physical form? Will Mayura ever fulfil her own dreams? Or will she remain trapped in her beautiful pinjaraa for life?
